testcase.name: test_02_change_to_frozen

failure.message: assert (None is not None or None is not None)

testcase.failure: tests/test_student_status_snapshot.py:124: in test_02_change_to_frozen event_loop.run_until_complete(_check()) /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_student_status_snapshot.py:121: in _check assert snap["academic_year"] is not None or snap["academic_year_id"] is not None E assert (None is not None or None is not None)

testcase.name: test_15_employee_without_permission_forbidden
testcase.failure: tests/test_student_status_snapshot.py:302: in test_15_employee_without_permission_forbidden assert r.status_code == 403, f"expected 403, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 403, got 200: {"items":[{"id":"6a4912121ef9f74d0e2d60fc","student_id":"TEST9ad9d57","reference_number":"TESTREF82a7b5","full_name":"TEST_SNAP_طالب_3","phone":null,"email":null,"status":"expelled","status_label":"مفصول","reason":"مخالفة أكاديمية","changed_at":"2026-07-04T14:00:51.364403+00:00","department_id":"698e500997fef774e66e93a8","department_name":"الشريعة والقانون","faculty_id":"698e4f9297fef774e66e93a4","faculty_name":"كلية الشريعة والقانون","snapshot_level":2,"snapshot_section":"أ","snapshot_semester_id":"6a21bee0ddb8d04530cf65f4","snapshot_semester_name":"الفصل الصيفي 2024-2025","snapshot_academic_year":null,"snapshot_captured_at":"2026-07-04T14:00:51.364403+00:00","has_snapshot":true},{"id":"6a4912121ef9f74d0e2d60fb","student_id":"TEST97e420b","reference_number":"TESTREF586d05","full_name":"TEST_SNAP_طالب_2","phone":null,"email":null,"status":"repeat","status_label":"إعادة","reason":"رسوب متكرر","changed_at":"2026-07-04T14:00:51.239970+00:00","department_id":"698e500997fef774e66e93a8","department_name":"الشريعة والقانون","faculty_id":"698e4f9297fef774e66e93a4","faculty_name":"كلية الشريعة والقانون","snapshot_level":2,"snapshot_section":"أ","snapshot_semester_id":"6a21bee0ddb8d04530cf65f4","snapshot_semester_name":"الفصل الصيفي 2024-2025","snapshot_academic_year":null,"snapshot_captured_at":"2026-07-04T14:00:51.239970+00:00","has_snapshot":true}],"total":2,"labels":{"active":"مستمر","repeat":"إعادة","graduated":"متخرج","expelled":"مفصول","frozen":"مجمَّد"}} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
